overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player traverses sidewalks, ascends to an elevated plaza with palm trees, explores a lower green level beneath an overpass, and moves through areas with massive digital billboards. The environment features cyberpunk architecture, bright sunlight mixed with neon signage, and reflective wet surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with neon storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the city sidewalk past pedestrians and illuminated storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk in same direction

entered.detail: tall building facade with glowing cyan and purple neon signage
row of palm trees lining the sidewalk center
tall vertical metal slat fence running along right side
large illuminated advertisement screen on building wall

segments.scene_description: Walking along a futuristic city sidewalk with neon-lit buildings on the left and a tall metal fence on the right. Palm trees line the path ahead while digital billboards glow against the morning light. Sparse pedestrian traffic moves in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide staircase ascending to elevated pedestrian plaza

events.description: approaching and beginning to ascend wide stairs to upper plaza level

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide concrete stairs toward the elevated plaza level

entered.detail: broad staircase with integrated lighting leading upward
concrete walls with horizontal neon strip lighting

segments.scene_description: Ascending a wide concrete staircase flanked by illuminated planter walls with neon strip lighting. The metal fence from the sidewalk falls behind as the camera climbs toward the elevated plaza, with the neon building now visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with palm trees and digital displays

events.description: beginning to descend stairs on the far side of the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the elevated plaza past benches and palm tree planters, then descending

notable_agents.action: person walking across the plaza perpendicular to camera path

entered.detail: large concrete planters with mature palm trees and integrated bench seating
massive curved digital billboard displaying advertisements
modern concrete seating integrated with planter walls

segments.scene_description: Traversing the elevated plaza with reflective tiled flooring and palm trees in illuminated planters. A large curved digital screen dominates the left side while the camera passes concrete benches. A pedestrian crosses the plaza before the camera begins descending stairs on the far side.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower green level beneath overpass with dense vegetation

events.description: entering lower green area with dense vegetation beneath overhead bridge structure
ascending stairs to return to upper plaza level

agents.ego_description: walking through the lower green area observing the overpass structure above, then climbing back up

entered.detail: elevated highway or monorail structure spanning above the green space
lush green trees and shrubs in the lower garden area
metal and concrete safety railing along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: Moving through a sheltered lower level with dense vegetation beneath a massive overpass bridge. The area is shaded with diffused natural light filtering through. The camera follows a path with concrete railings before ascending stairs back to the upper level, leaving the green space behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper plaza with multiple large digital billboards

events.description: abrupt cut to new location with blue and pink neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza area with towering digital advertisements before scene transition

entered.detail: building facade covered with multiple large digital screens showing various advertisements
tall cylindrical tower with wraparound digital displays

segments.scene_description: Walking through an open plaza surrounded by massive digital billboards and advertisement screens covering the building walls. A cylindrical tower with wraparound displays stands in the distance. The clip ends with an abrupt transition to a new location featuring blue and pink neon lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a futuristic city, transitioning from a neon-lit sidewalk to a lush lower level before ending in a plaza of massive digital displays. It begins by moving along a sidewalk flanked by a metal fence and glowing billboards under the morning light, before ascending a wide concrete staircase lined with neon strip lighting. As the camera reaches an elevated plaza, the environment opens up into a space of reflective tiled flooring and palm trees, dominated by a large curved digital screen. The scene then shifts downward into a shaded lower level beneath a massive overpass bridge, where diffused light filters through dense vegetation and concrete railings. Finally, the camera climbs back to an open plaza surrounded by towering advertisement screens and a cylindrical display tower before an abrupt transition into a zone of blue and pink neon lighting.
